NVDA.reasoning: CATALYST WINDOW: NVDA Q1 FY2027 earnings ~May 20, 2026 (~13-14 trading days out) is the primary hard catalyst. AMD earnings are imminent (within ~1-5 trading days) and will serve as an AI data center read-through. Hyperscaler AI capex disclosures (week of Apr 28-30) produced a mixed result: Alphabet +7% and Amazon +2% post-earnings confirmed incremental GPU spend (direct NVDA demand signal), but Meta fell -9% on AI capex shock creating near-term sector sentiment headwind. NET NEWS SENTIMENT: Moderately positive on medium-to-long term thesis. Bullish: 94% of ~42 analysts rate Buy with avg PT $267 (~34% upside from $199.57), Blackwell Ultra shipping now, Rubin Ultra roadmap intact, Alphabet/Amazon capex confirmation. Bearish: Meta's AI capex selloff still overhang, H20 China export ban ($4.5B charge booked), custom ASIC threat longer-term. Net: mixed but tilting positive for the earnings catalyst setup. INSIDER ACTIVITY: Quiet in current 30-day window (0 trades). Background is structurally bearish (706 of 735 historic transactions bearish) but those are 10b5-1 scheduled sales at $171-177 — not an acute near-term signal at $199. TECHNICAL SETUP QUALITY: Price pulled back -7.7% from $216.83 high to $199.57 in 3 sessions on elevated volume (1.52x avg). Setup is a constructive retracement, NOT exhaustion: price holds above EMA/SMA 20/50/200 on daily; daily EMA aligned uptrend true; daily ADX 55.96 (strong trend) with plus_di (29.83) > minus_di (14.49) still net bullish. Hourly RSI-21 = 23.58 (deeply oversold) with OBV diverging upward from falling price — accumulation signature. Hourly support at $199.00 (18 tests) is the critical near-term level; price is sitting directly on it. Fib 38.2% retracement at $196.75 provides the stop anchor. LESSON FLAG: Most recent NVDA lesson (2026-04-30) was a loss — prior EMA pullback Fib dip-buy triggered stop at $205.30. That stop zone is now fully broken, so this is a fresh entry at a lower and more defensible level. Confidence reduced to reflect that failure pattern. CONFIDENCE DIAL: 58 — bullish thesis intact but Meta overhang, recent trade loss, and mixed hyperscaler reaction prevent high-conviction score. AMD read-through within days could catalyze entry confirmation.
